steps.title: Multiply by y
steps.content:
Start with the given equation. Since $x$ is divided by $y$, multiply both sides by $y$ to isolate $x$.
$$b-17=\frac{x}{y}$$
$$y(b-17)=x$$

steps.title: Distribute the factor
steps.content:
Distribute $y$ across both terms inside the parentheses.
$$y(b-17)=by-17y$$
So the equation becomes
$$x=by-17y$$

steps.title: Check by substituting
steps.content: Substituting $by-17y$ back for $x$ gives $$\frac{by-17y}{y}=b-17$$ This matches the original equation, so the expression correctly solves for $x$. The answer is B.
